documentation.description:
unsupported macro: LZMA_STREAM_INIT { NULL, 0, 0, NULL, 0, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 0, 0, 0, 0, LZMA_RESERVED_ENUM, LZMA_RESERVED_ENUM }
*
 * \file        lzma/base.h
 * \brief       Data types and functions used in many places in liblzma API

simple_types.name: lzma_action
simple_types.code:
type lzma_action is
  (LZMA_RUN,
   LZMA_SYNC_FLUSH,
   LZMA_FULL_FLUSH,
   LZMA_FINISH);

simple_types.name: lzma_ret
simple_types.code:
type lzma_ret is
  (LZMA_OK,
   LZMA_STREAM_END,
   LZMA_NO_CHECK,
   LZMA_UNSUPPORTED_CHECK,
   LZMA_GET_CHECK,
   LZMA_MEM_ERROR,
   LZMA_MEMLIMIT_ERROR,
   LZMA_FORMAT_ERROR,
   …,
   LZMA_PROG_ERROR);

record_types.name: lzma_allocator
lzma_stream

constants.name: LZMA_STREAM_INIT
constants.code:
LZMA_STREAM_INIT : constant lzma_stream :=
  (next_in => null, avail_in => 0, total_in => 0,
   next_out => null, avail_out => 0, total_out => 0, allocator => null,
   internal => System.Null_Address, reserved_ptr1 => System.Null_Address,
   reserved_ptr2 => System.Null_Address, reserved_ptr3 => System.Null_Address,
   reserved_ptr4 => System.Null_Address, reserved_enum1 => LZMA_RESERVED_ENUM,
   reserved_enum2 => LZMA_RESERVED_ENUM, reserved_int1 => 0,
   reserved_int2 => 0, others => 0);

subprograms.name: lzma_code
subprograms.code: function lzma_code (strm : access lzma_stream; action : lzma_action) return lzma_ret

subprograms.name: lzma_memlimit_get
subprograms.code: function lzma_memlimit_get (strm : access constant lzma_stream) return Long_Long_Integer

subprograms.name: lzma_memlimit_set
subprograms.code: function lzma_memlimit_set (strm : access lzma_stream; memlimit : Long_Long_Integer) return lzma_ret

subprograms.name: lzma_memusage
subprograms.code: function lzma_memusage (strm : access constant lzma_stream) return Long_Long_Integer
